inputs.text: Main thoda bukhar mehsoos kar rahi hoon, sar dard ho raha hai aur thoda kamzor mehsoos ho raha hoon

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Low-grade fever and malaise are common symptoms of viral fever

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Headache and fatigue can be symptoms of gastroenteritis

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Although possible, typhoid is less likely at this stage without more specific symptoms

inputs.text: Bukhar roz badh raha hai, pet dard ho raha hai aur kabz ho rahi hai

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Step-wise fever and constipation are characteristic of typhoid

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Abdominal pain and constipation can be symptoms of gastroenteritis

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Although viral fever can cause abdominal pain, the pattern of fever is more suggestive of typhoid

inputs.text: Tez bukhar ho raha hai, kabz ke baad dast ho rahi hai aur bahut kamzor mehsoos ho rahi hoon

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: The combination of high fever, diarrhea after constipation, and severe weakness are cardinal signs of typhoid

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: While gastroenteritis can cause diarrhea, the overall pattern of symptoms is more suggestive of typhoid

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Malaria can cause high fever, but the other symptoms are not as typical for malaria

inputs.text: Main bahut thakawat mehsoos kar rahi hoon, bukhar abhi tak hai aur dard badh raha hai
inputs.image_desc: prescription and blood test report shown

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: The persistence of high fever, worsening abdominal pain, and the results of the blood test confirm the diagnosis of typhoid

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to the specific pattern of symptoms and test results

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to the lack of typical symptoms and test results
